channel.title: npj Comput. Mater.
channel.description: Filtered papers from npj Comput. Mater.

item.title: Physics-Informed Directional Decoding of the Structure-Property Relationship in Porous Metamaterials
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 08 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02215-6

Physics-informed directional decoding of the structure-property relationship in porous metamaterials

item.title: TrussGPT: Large Language Model-Driven Inverse Design Framework for Truss Metamaterials
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 04 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02175-x

TrussGPT: large language model-driven inverse design framework for truss metamaterials
